prompt: Create a square cinematic macro photograph of a surreal miniature food-landscape titled MINI LONDON, showing London rising from a vast desert of fine sparkling golden cane sugar. The scene contains exactly 7 recognizable landmark miniatures: 1) Tower Bridge in the front-left made from orange-red candy sticks with pale sugar-cable suspension lines, 2) Big Ben / Elizabeth Tower as the central centerpiece made from stacked glossy red candy wafers with cream icing trim and a readable clock face, 3) The Shard behind it on the right as a tall translucent faceted sugar-glass shard glowing warm white, 4) 30 St Mary Axe / the Gherkin on the far right made from dark green and pale green checker-patterned candy scales, 5) a small red British telephone booth beside a turquoise pond in the foreground, 6) a red rounded modern tower in the mid-background, and 7) a cluster of smaller colorful London skyscrapers and cathedral-like towers made from edible sweets. Surround the buildings with exactly 3 main natural miniature areas: a turquoise sugar-water pond in the foreground center, dense broccoli-like green shrubs and trees around it and between buildings, and scattered palm-like sugar plants sprouting from the sand. Use fine golden cane sugar for the desert base, with visible sugar crystals and shallow dunes. Add theatrical colored mist and bokeh lights in the background, with deep black, purple, blue, and magenta haze, plus warm golden highlights on the sugar and landmarks. Place the title text in the upper-left in large elegant white serif capitals, two lines, reading MINI above LONDON. Use a shallow depth of field, tilt-shift miniature scale, ultra-detailed edible textures, glossy candy surfaces, dramatic studio lighting, photoreal macro realism, no people, no watermark, no extra text.
